summary.shape_sentence: Bullish recovery trend day: early dip under open, midday reclaim, afternoon continuation, close near HOD.

goat.note: Midday long after failed breakdown and reclaim; led the afternoon trend extension.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish signals appeared around the breakdown/short-warning zone but failed after price reclaimed demand.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish confirmations clustered into the afternoon continuation and supported the close near highs.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 27270-27330 was reclaimed and broken during the afternoon drive.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 27130-27210 was respected and became the main launch zone.

time_markers.10am_blue: Below/near open, probing lower demand after a weak early push.
time_markers.12pm_red: Reclaim phase; failed breakdown converting into bullish rotation.
time_markers.2pm_green: Upside continuation active above reclaimed levels.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Green close near HOD, confirming bullish session completion.

takeaway: Bullish trend day with an early failed breakdown, defended morning demand, and a midday long that became the reference pivot. Best comparable: gap-up pullback into demand followed by afternoon upside continuation and close near HOD.
